subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the presence of the Throne and hath been numbered among the triumphant ones, who hath hearkened unto the call of his Lord, the All-Merciful, when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن حضر لدی العرش و کان من الفائزین و سمع ندآء ربه الرحمن اذ
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @naming of children; of individuals, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
